title: Israeli forces fired 900 bullets at Gaza medical convoy, new report reveals
fullText: NewsFeedA new report revealed that Israeli soldiers fired over 900 bullets at a convoy of Palestinian aid workers near Rafah in March 2025, killing 15 medics. Investigators say the evidence reveals the cover-up of a war crime.Published On 26 Feb 2026
summary: A new report found that Israeli soldiers fired over 900 bullets at Palestinian aid workers in March 2025, killing 15.
